records.question: What were our total store sales?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales FROM store_sales;

records.question: What were our total store sales by item category?

trace.sql:
SELECT i.i_category AS item_category, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY total_store_sales DESC;

records.question: What are our net store sales after returns, broken down by item?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ss_item_sk) AS distinct_sold_items FROM store_sales;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sr_item_sk) AS distinct_returned_items FROM store_returns;

WITH sales AS (
  SELECT ss_item_sk AS item_sk, SUM(ss_net_paid) AS gross_store_sales
  FROM store_sales
  GROUP BY ss_item_sk
), returns AS (
  SELECT sr_item_sk AS item_sk, SUM(sr_return_amt) AS returned_sales
  FROM store_returns
  GROUP BY sr_item_sk
), net AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(s.item_sk, r.item_sk) AS item_sk,
         COALESCE(gross_store_sales, 0) AS gross_store_sales,
         COALESCE(returned_sales, 0) AS returned_sales,
         COALESCE(gross_store_sales, 0) - COALESCE(returned_sales, 0) AS net_store_sales_after_returns
  FROM sales s
  FULL OUTER JOIN returns r ON s.item_sk = r.item_sk
)
SELECT n.item_sk, i.i_item_id, i.i_product_name,
       gross_store_sales, returned_sales, net_store_sales_after_returns
FROM net n
LEFT JOIN item i ON i.i_item_sk = n.item_sk
ORDER BY net_store_sales_after_returns DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH sales AS (
  SELECT ss_item_sk AS item_sk, SUM(ss_net_paid) AS gross_store_sales
  FROM store_sales
  GROUP BY ss_item_sk
), returns AS (
  SELECT sr_item_sk AS item_sk, SUM(sr_return_amt) AS returned_sales
  FROM store_returns
  GROUP BY sr_item_sk
), net AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(s.item_sk, r.item_sk) AS item_sk,
         COALESCE(gross_store_sales, 0) - COALESCE(returned_sales, 0) AS net_store_sales_after_returns
  FROM sales s
  FULL OUTER JOIN returns r ON s.item_sk = r.item_sk
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS item_count,
       SUM(net_store_sales_after_returns) AS total_net_store_sales_after_returns,
       MIN(net_store_sales_after_returns) AS min_item_net,
       MAX(net_store_sales_after_returns) AS max_item_net
FROM net;

records.question: How much did customers return, in dollars, by store?

trace.sql:
SELECT s.s_store_sk, s.s_store_name, SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
FROM store_returns sr
JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_store_sk, s.s_store_name
ORDER BY s.s_store_sk

records.question: What were our total store sales and total returns for each item category?

trace.sql:
WITH sales_by_cat AS (
  SELECT i.i_category AS category,
         SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  GROUP BY i.i_category
), returns_by_cat AS (
  SELECT i.i_category AS category,
         SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
  FROM store_returns sr
  JOIN item i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  GROUP BY i.i_category
)
SELECT COALESCE(s.category, r.category) AS category,
       COALESCE(s.total_store_sales, 0) AS total_store_sales,
       COALESCE(r.total_returns, 0) AS total_returns
FROM sales_by_cat s
FULL OUTER JOIN returns_by_cat r USING (category)
ORDER BY category;

SELECT i.i_category AS category,
       SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY i.i_category;

SELECT i.i_category AS category,
       SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
FROM store_returns sr
JOIN item i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY i.i_category;

records.question: Which items were returned the most, compared with how many were sold?

trace.sql:
WITH returns AS (
  SELECT sr_item_sk AS item_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS returned_qty, SUM(sr_return_amt) AS returned_amt
  FROM store_returns
  GROUP BY sr_item_sk
), sales AS (
  SELECT ss_item_sk AS item_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS sold_qty, SUM(ss_net_paid) AS net_paid
  FROM store_sales
  GROUP BY ss_item_sk
)
SELECT i.i_item_sk, i.i_item_id, i.i_product_name, i.i_item_desc, r.returned_qty, s.sold_qty,
       ROUND(100.0 * r.returned_qty / NULLIF(s.sold_qty,0), 2) AS return_pct
FROM returns r
LEFT JOIN sales s ON s.item_sk = r.item_sk
LEFT JOIN item i ON i.i_item_sk = r.item_sk
ORDER BY r.returned_qty DESC, return_pct DESC
LIMIT 10;

records.question: What were our store sales in the year 2001?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_2001
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2001;

records.question: What is the average sales price per item?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) / NULLIF(SUM(ss_quantity), 0) AS avg_sales_price_per_item
FROM store_sales;

records.question: What is our net store revenue (sales minus returns) per customer?

trace.sql:
WITH sales AS (
  SELECT SUM(ss_net_paid) AS total_sales
  FROM store_sales
), returns AS (
  SELECT SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
  FROM store_returns
), customers AS (
  SELECT ss_customer_sk AS customer_sk FROM store_sales WHERE ss_customer_sk IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT sr_customer_sk AS customer_sk FROM store_returns WHERE sr_customer_sk IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  total_sales,
  total_returns,
  total_sales - total_returns AS net_store_revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
  (total_sales - total_returns) / COUNT(*) AS net_store_revenue_per_customer
FROM sales, returns, customers
GROUP BY total_sales, total_returns;

records.question: How many separate item returns were recorded?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS separate_item_returns FROM store_returns;

records.question: What were our total store sales by state?

trace.sql:
SELECT s.s_state AS state, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_store_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
ORDER BY s.s_state;

records.question: What is our total store sales revenue including tax?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(ss_net_paid_inc_tax) AS total_store_sales_revenue_including_tax FROM store_sales;

records.question: What is the total quantity of items sold and returned, per store?

trace.sql:
WITH sales AS (
  SELECT ss_store_sk AS store_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity
  FROM store_sales
  GROUP BY ss_store_sk
), returns AS (
  SELECT sr_store_sk AS store_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS total_returned_quantity
  FROM store_returns
  GROUP BY sr_store_sk
)
SELECT COALESCE(s.s_store_id, CAST(COALESCE(sa.store_sk, r.store_sk) AS VARCHAR)) AS store_id,
       s.s_store_name AS store_name,
       COALESCE(sa.total_sold_quantity, 0) AS total_sold_quantity,
       COALESCE(r.total_returned_quantity, 0) AS total_returned_quantity
FROM sales sa
FULL OUTER JOIN returns r ON sa.store_sk = r.store_sk
LEFT JOIN store s ON s.s_store_sk = COALESCE(sa.store_sk, r.store_sk)
ORDER BY store_id;

SELECT COALESCE(s.s_store_id, CAST(q.store_sk AS VARCHAR), 'UNKNOWN') AS store_id,
       s.s_store_name AS store_name,
       SUM(q.sold_qty) AS total_sold_quantity,
       SUM(q.returned_qty) AS total_returned_quantity
FROM (
  SELECT ss_store_sk AS store_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS sold_qty, 0::HUGEINT AS returned_qty
  FROM store_sales
  GROUP BY ss_store_sk
  UNION ALL
  SELECT sr_store_sk AS store_sk, 0::HUGEINT AS sold_qty, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS returned_qty
  FROM store_returns
  GROUP BY sr_store_sk
) q
LEFT JOIN store s ON s.s_store_sk = q.store_sk
GROUP BY COALESCE(s.s_store_id, CAST(q.store_sk AS VARCHAR), 'UNKNOWN'), s.s_store_name
ORDER BY store_id;

WITH combined AS (
  SELECT ss_store_sk AS store_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS sold_qty, CAST(0 AS HUGEINT) AS returned_qty
  FROM store_sales
  GROUP BY ss_store_sk
  UNION ALL
  SELECT sr_store_sk AS store_sk, CAST(0 AS HUGEINT) AS sold_qty, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS returned_qty
  FROM store_returns
  GROUP BY sr_store_sk
)
SELECT COALESCE(st.s_store_id, CAST(combined.store_sk AS VARCHAR), 'UNKNOWN') AS store_id,
       st.s_store_name AS store_name,
       SUM(combined.sold_qty) AS total_sold_quantity,
       SUM(combined.returned_qty) AS total_returned_quantity
FROM combined
LEFT JOIN store st ON st.s_store_sk = combined.store_sk
GROUP BY COALESCE(st.s_store_id, CAST(combined.store_sk AS VARCHAR), 'UNKNOWN'), st.s_store_name
ORDER BY store_id;

records.question: Which state had the highest return rate?

trace.sql:
SELECT s.s_state, SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS sold_qty
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
ORDER BY sold_qty DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH sales_by_state AS (
  SELECT s.s_state, SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS sold_qty
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
  GROUP BY s.s_state
), returns_by_state AS (
  SELECT s.s_state, SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity) AS returned_qty
  FROM store_returns sr
  JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
  GROUP BY s.s_state
)
SELECT sales_by_state.s_state,
       returned_qty,
       sold_qty,
       returned_qty * 1.0 / NULLIF(sold_qty, 0) AS return_rate
FROM sales_by_state
LEFT JOIN returns_by_state USING (s_state)
ORDER BY return_rate DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.s_state, SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity) AS returned_qty
FROM store_returns sr
JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
ORDER BY returned_qty DESC;

SELECT s.s_state, SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS sold_qty
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
ORDER BY sold_qty DESC;
SELECT 7034924::DOUBLE / 135678245::DOUBLE AS return_rate, (7034924::DOUBLE / 135678245::DOUBLE) * 100 AS return_rate_pct;
